category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/linux-test-project/lcov describes LCOV as tools to manipulate and display program coverage data.
source_facts.description says it is a graphical front-end for GCC's coverage testing tool gcov.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository README heading and repository description use LCOV.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface.
Official GitHub repository includes a man directory, and the README points to lcov/geninfo/genhtml man pages for details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/linux-test-project/lcov, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents LCOV coverage data manipulation and display plus genhtml/lcov/geninfo man pages.
source_facts.description identifies GCC gcov coverage tooling.
